THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL BY COURT - PROVE-UP HEARING. APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. THE COURT FOUND IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF NCCS, INC. AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WAI KEUNG CHENG IN THE TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $4,926.56. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-29-2003 IN DEPT. 504 - JUDGE DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: J. BRYCE, #3321 (504)
